review.label: ⚠ REVIEW
review.meaning: Thin margin. May not cover OpEx.

below_floor.label: ✗ BELOW FLOOR
below_floor.meaning: Below minimum. Do not proceed without owner approval.

strong.label: ✓ STRONG
strong.meaning: Profitable after all costs including team time.

on_target.label: → ON TARGET
on_target.meaning: Acceptable net return. Keep hours in check.

thin.label: ⚠ THIN
thin.meaning: Breaking even. Only justified for strategic relationship value.

losing_money.label: ✗ LOSING MONEY
losing_money.meaning: Program costs more than it generates. Walk away or restructure.
